name: Pricing & Cost Transparency
description: How pricing information should be displayed to build trust and enable informed purchasing decisions

heuristics.principle: The full price should be immediately visible without requiring interaction
checkpoints: Price is visible above the fold
Price does not require clicking tabs or expandable sections
Price is prominently displayed near product title
Price uses adequate font size and contrast

heuristics.principle: Unit pricing should be shown where quantity or size varies
checkpoints: Price per unit is displayed for variable quantity products
Size/quantity relationship to price is clear
Bulk pricing tiers are clearly explained if applicable
Unit price helps comparison with similar products

heuristics.principle: Delivery costs, taxes or fees should be clearly signposted near the primary action
checkpoints: Shipping cost or free shipping threshold is mentioned
Tax inclusion/exclusion is clarified where relevant
Additional fees are disclosed before checkout
Delivery estimate or timeframe is visible

heuristics.principle: Promotions or discounts should be explained clearly without ambiguity
checkpoints: Original and sale prices are both shown when discounted
Discount percentage or savings amount is clear
Promotion conditions or limitations are stated
Promotion end date is shown if time-limited
